0.text: Bilateral pleural effusion, more prominent on the right

1.text: Pleural effusion measuring 3.0 cm at its thickest point

2.text: Consolidation adjacent to the effusion in the lower lobe of the right lung

3.text: Loss of volume in the lower lobe of the right lung suggestive of passive atelectasis

4.text: Peripheral and centrally located ground-glass opacities in both lungs

5.text: Ground-glass opacities accompanied by linear densities parallel to the pleura
